_comment: R-064-6 DXZ/T_Live post-go-live burn-in config. Read-only evidence generator; never operates T_Live and never toggles AutoTrading.
_decided_by: Claude 2026-06-01 (OWNER delegated). OWNER decision 2026-06-01: Darwinex Zero uses virtual funds, so the DXZ/T_Live account is already the forward test. R-064-6 is repurposed from a separate demo-terminal burn-in into a post-go-live READ-ONLY evaluation gate on T_Live. The OWNER+Claude T_Live flip is the go-live; this burn-in only observes the first 42d evidence window and produces PASS/HOLD evidence. Rationale: window 42d (6wk) spans multiple regimes like the Kaspareit Beta phases without stalling deployment; dd_tolerance 1.5pp = small live-vs-backtest buffer over the Monte-Carlo p95 (mission DD is tight: 5% daily / 20% total); sharpe_band 1.0 absolute allows realistic forward Sharpe decay on a short window (e.g. backtest 2.4 -> live >=1.4 still strong); first_deployment_only so incremental sleeve changes go via the admission gate + re-fit (already evidence-based) without re-burning-in every time.
